focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】Lorde says AI glasses are “not sexy”
【金融新闻】创业板制度革新落地见效
【中国新闻】中国公共卫生专家组赴“突发事件管理支持小组”支援埃博拉疫情防控
【世界新闻】How a former 'street kid' is key to South Africa's police corruption inquiry

items.title: Lorde says AI glasses are “not sexy”
items.summary: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said on stage.

items.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
items.summary: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is de

items.title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
items.summary: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.

items.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
items.summary: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

items.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
items.summary: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, gi

items.title: 创业板制度革新落地见效
items.summary: 今年4月10日，中国证监会发布《关于深化创业板改革 更好服务新质生产力发展的意见》(以下简称《意见》)，深化创业板改革正式启动。如今，本轮改革已满3个月，随着各项政策举措落地见效，已有越来越多优质创新企业与投资者从中获益。

items.title: 遇到航班超售，如何保障权益
items.summary: 暑期出行高峰将至，航班超售现象再次进入公众视野。

items.title: 中国船，何以持续领航全球
items.summary: 眼下，千行百业中，哪个行业称得上“火”？有人选择新能源汽车、人形机器人，还有很多人会把目光投向一个重要的传统产业——造船业。

items.title: Analyst Report: Fedex Corp
items.summary: （该来源未提供摘要，请点击查看原文）

items.title: Market Update: FDX, JPM, VFC

items.title: 中国公共卫生专家组赴“突发事件管理支持小组”支援埃博拉疫情防控
items.summary: 记者从国家疾病预防控制局获悉，应非洲疾控中心和世界卫生组织的联合邀请，今日(7月15日)凌晨，我国赴“突发事件管理支持小组”(IMST)公共卫生专家组从北京启程，前往乌干达，协同开展埃博拉疫情的防控国际合作。

items.title: 一场80年前的讲演，为何至今仍被铭记
美国连续四晚对伊朗实施打击
items.summary: 中新网7月15日电 据美国哥伦比亚广播公司(CBS)报道，一名美国官员证实，美国军方在当地时间14日对伊朗境内军事目标实施了多次打击。

items.title: 伊朗军方：无人机击中美军驻约旦基地
items.summary: 中新网7月15日电 据俄罗斯卫星通讯社15日报道，伊朗军方称，无人机击中了美军驻约旦阿兹拉克基地。

items.title: 美国重启对伊朗港口的封锁
items.summary: 中新网7月15日电 据美国哥伦比亚广播公司(CBS)报道，美国中央司令部表示，应美国总统特朗普的命令，美国军方于美国东部时间14日16时恢复了对伊朗港口的封锁。

items.title: How a former 'street kid' is key to South Africa's police corruption inquiry
items.summary: Vusimusi "Cat" Matlala, due to appear at the Madlanga Commission, grew up hustling to make a living.

items.title: From Wimbledon towels to Scotch: What India-UK trade deal could mean for shoppers
items.summary: The free trade agreement between the world's fifth and sixth largest economies has come into effect - can it deliver?

items.title: Watch: The clash between US and Iran for control of the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The BBC's Barbara Plett Usher examines the latest tensions over the key international shipping channel.

items.title: Wife describes moment husband nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane
items.summary: A man was nearly sucked head-first out of a cabin window mid-air on a Ryanair plane.

items.title: Trump scraps threat of 20% fee on Hormuz cargo as US resumes blockade of Iran ports
items.summary: Trump drops a 24-hour-old vow to charge cargo ships for using the Strait as the US continues its battle to break Iran's hold on the waterway.
